translations: (will be) destroyed except His Face To Him
(is) the Decision and to Him you will be returned
puzzle.hint: This verse reminds believers that only Allah's eternal essence endures, while all of creation will ultimately perish and return to Him.
puzzle.arabic: وَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۘ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ هَالِكٌ إِلَّا وَجْهَهُۥ ۚ لَهُ ٱلْحُكْمُ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: And do not invoke with Allāh another deity. There is no deity except Him. Everything will be destroyed except His Face. His is the judgement, and to Him you will be returned.
